RESOLVED.title: Network Cockpit READY_FOR_RESET State Logic Mismatch
RESOLVED.description: Network Cockpit treated READY_FOR_RESET as an active start state with automated bootstrap injection, breaking the expected transitional workflow. Should display 'BETWEEN LOOPS' interface with manual session start instructions.
RESOLVED.rootCause: Divergent UI logic between cockpit.html and network_cockpit.html - READY_FOR_RESET was incorrectly treated as actionable state rather than transitional pause
RESOLVED.fix: Modified network_cockpit.html loadLoopStatus function (lines ~1597-1661) to match original cockpit behavior: removed erroneous 'START LOOP' button, added bootstrapExists flag check, display manual instructions for session restart
RESOLVED.principle: Don't automate transitional states - READY_FOR_RESET is a pause point requiring manual session restart, not an automation trigger
